title: Leninsk-Kuznetskiy Heavy Rain
lead: Leninsk-Kuznetskiy is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.86. This anomaly has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Leninsk-Kuznetskiy is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 97% and wind speed of 21.9 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 14.5 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG indicate a substantial impact on heating and energy demand.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical weather event.
